ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot mimicking the act of laying down railway tracks.  The robot will use both arms to create a motion of placing and connecting sections of track.  The movement will be deliberate and methodical, reflecting the precision required in track laying.  We'll use a 4-frame sequence for clarity.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready to lay track
arms lift slightly, preparing to place a section
arms move outwards, laying the track down firmly
arms return to rest, the track is set
